_meta.description: Living index of all canonical artifacts for the AOS v3 spec development process (8 stages). SSOT for cleanup decisions: LOCKED/ACTIVE = keep; SUPERSEDED/ARCHIVE_PENDING = Team 191 archives at WP close.
_meta.note: wp_id is provisional (AOS_V3_SPEC_DEVELOPMENT) — update when formal WP ID is assigned in pipeline.
